title: Implement async retry with last-exception re-raise
description: Implement aretry.retry.retry_call(make_coro, attempts): an async function that calls make_coro() (a zero-argument callable returning a FRESH coroutine) up to `attempts` times, returns the result of the first successful call, and if every attempt raises re-raises the LAST exception. The snapshot is a stub that raises NotImplementedError. Fix aretry/retry.py. Do not modify any test files.
